summary: Iteration 55: Pvt Paddy Purchase Flow Update - All 16 backend tests PASSED. Verified new flow: Cash+Diesel go to Truck Payment (category=truck_no, party_type='Truck'), Advance (paid_amount) goes to Party Ledger as credit. Party Ledger NO LONGER shows cash/diesel credits. Frontend Pvt Trading page loads correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend private_trading.py: _create_cashbook_diesel_for_pvt_paddy helper correctly separates cash/diesel (Truck) from advance (Party)
Line 112-130: Cash paid creates TWO entries - cash book nikasi under truck + truck ledger nikasi under truck
Line 145-154: Diesel paid creates diesel_accounts entry + truck ledger nikasi under truck
Line 155-165: Advance (paid_amount) creates ONLY cash book nikasi under party with party_type='Pvt Paddy Purchase'
Backend ledgers.py line 183-188: Party ledger correctly shows ONLY advance as credit, NOT cash/diesel
PUT handler (line 201-202) correctly handles empty string conversion with 'or 0' pattern
seed_data_creation: None - tests use dynamic TEST_ prefixed data with auto-cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pvt Paddy flow updated: Cash+Diesel go to Truck Payment (linked by truck_no). Advance (paid_amount) goes to Party Ledger as credit. Party ledger query shows 2 entries per pvt paddy - debit (total_amount) + credit (advance only). Cash book shows: 1) cash under truck (party_type=Truck), 2) advance under party (party_type=Pvt Paddy Purchase). Total cash deducted = cash_paid + advance. Diesel goes to diesel_accounts only (not cash book).
